case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $975.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: POS ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF LEONARDO GONZALEZ FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $488.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT LEONARDO GONZALEZ. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $487.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF LEONARDO GONZALEZ. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF LEONARDO GONZALEZ IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ADDS: CLAIMANT FAILED TO SHOW INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY PURSUANT TO H & S CODE SECTION 11488.5(A)(1). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF LEONARDO GONZALEZ
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA GONZALEZ, LEONARDO
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Claim Of Leonardo Gonzalez
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion to Strike the Claim of Leonardo Gonzalez. (This matter was recalled at 10:00 am, claimant arrived late.) Appearances: Leonard Gonzalez Claimant in Pro Per appearing and opposing party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike the claim of Leonardo Gonzalez is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court adds: claimant failed to show interest in the property pursuant to H & S Code section 11488.5(a)(1). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
